calibration_scope: synthetic frozen-probe smoke plus persisted mini-real claim summaries

reports.calibration_basis: Empirical smoke boundary from persisted mini-real claim summaries, retained as reviewer-facing heuristic until a larger held-out sweep exists.

evidence.interpretation: Below preferred warning threshold but close enough to keep no-leakage wording cautious without frozen audit evidence.
Existing claim summary uses the same 0.08/0.12 reviewer band.

reports.calibration_basis: Heuristic because explicit probe-fit and encoder-penalty routing was introduced in Q14 P2. Any sustained positive encoder-facing penalty after warmup indicates recoverable off-modality signal under the configured tolerance.

evidence.interpretation: Gradient-routing tests validate semantics, not population thresholds.

reports.insufficient_data_policy: status=insufficient_data blocks no-leakage wording and must be reported explicitly.
reports.calibration_basis: Heuristic smoke threshold over separately fit frozen ridge probes; promote to empirical only after enough held-out real split rows are available.

evidence.interpretation: Synthetic smoke exercises the artifact schema and threshold logic but is not enough for strong no-leakage claims.

no_leakage_wording_requires: explicit encoder penalty at or below warning threshold after warmup
frozen_probe_audit status ok with improvement_over_baseline at or below warning threshold
sufficient held-out rows for every claim-facing route
caution_wording_when: similarity_proxy is between preferred and hard thresholds
any explicit route is positive but below the hard threshold
fail_wording_when: frozen_probe_audit improvement_over_baseline exceeds the hard threshold
split leakage checks detect protein overlap or duplicate example ids
